metaTitle: Lorem Ipsum Generator — Professional Placeholder Text (Free & Private)
metaDescription: Generate high-quality Lorem Ipsum placeholder text instantly. Choose by paragraphs, sentences, or words. Includes optional HTML tags. 100% private and offline-ready.
introSummary: Our professional Lorem Ipsum Generator is the go-to utility for designers, web developers, and typographers. Whether you're mocking up a new website layout, testing font pairings, or filling out a print brochure, our tool provides the industry-standard 'dummy text' derived from Cicero's classical Latin works. With support for custom lengths and automatic HTML tag wrapping, you can streamline your creative workflow without ever leaving your browser.

contextUsage.title: For UI/UX & Web Design
contextUsage.desc: Fill website wireframes and prototypes with realistic text density to focus on visual hierarchy and layout without distraction.

contextUsage.title: For Front-End Development
contextUsage.desc:
Quickly generate paragraphs wrapped in

tags to test CSS styling, line-heights, and responsive typography in your code editor.

contextUsage.title: For Print & Graphic Design
contextUsage.desc: Populate brochure templates, flyers, or magazine layouts with classic Latin filler text to demonstrate final design aesthetics to clients.

howto.description: Choose between Paragraphs, Sentences, or Words depending on the UI component you are designing (e.g., 'Words' for buttons, 'Paragraphs' for blogs).
Use the slider or input field to define exactly how much placeholder text you need. Our generator updates the preview in real-time.

Enable 'Include

tags' if you are a developer. This wraps each block of text in clean HTML tags for instant code integration.
Click 'Copy' to grab the generated text. Since it's local JS-based, there's zero delay and your data never leaves your device.

why: Industry Standard — Uses the classic 'De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum' text by Cicero, providing a natural-looking distribution of letters.
Highly Customizable — Generate exactly what you need, from a single 3-word headline to a 50-paragraph long-form article mockup.

Developer Friendly — Optional HTML tag wrapping (

tags) allows for seamless 'Copy & Paste' directly into VS Code or other IDEs.
Real-Time Speed — No 'Generate' button waits. As you move the slider, the placeholder text updates instantly in front of your eyes.
100% Private & Offline — Perfect for internal company projects; your mockup content and settings are never sent to a server.
Clean & Minimalist — No ads, no watermarks, and no registration. Just a high-performance utility designed for professional workflows.

faq.q: What is the meaning of 'Lorem Ipsum'?
faq.a: While it looks like Latin, 'Lorem Ipsum' is actually nonsensical. It is a scrambled version of a 1st-century BC Latin text, used to prevent readers from being distracted by the content.

faq.q: Why don't designers use real text for mockups?
faq.a: Real text can be distracting. Using placeholder text allows clients and designers to focus purely on the graphic elements like layout, color, and typography.

faq.q: Does this tool support HTML tags for lists?
faq.a:
The current version supports

tag wrapping. For more complex structures like

    or
  • , we recommend generating 'Words' and manually wrapping them.
No. Lorem Ipsum is a standard that has been in the public domain for centuries. You are free to use it in both personal and commercial projects.

faq.q: Can I generate a specific number of words for a button?
faq.a: Yes! Switch the unit mode to 'Words' and set the amount to 2 or 3 to see how your UI buttons look with standard placeholder labels.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Accurate simulation of Western language character frequency
Granular control for headlines, captions, and body copy
Ready-to-use snippets for React, Vue, or static HTML projects
Ensures no project details are leaked to external APIs
Instantaneous UI updates even for large amounts of text

troubleshooting: Slider not moving? Ensure your browser's JavaScript is enabled. This tool relies on local scripts to generate text in real-time.
HTML tags not copying? Make sure the 'Include HTML Tags' toggle is turned ON before you click the Copy button.
Text looks repetitive? Since it's a randomized loop of a finite source text, very large generations (100+ paragraphs) will eventually repeat patterns.
proTips: Designers: Use the 'Sentences' mode to fill out image captions or testimonials for a more natural, varied look than identical paragraphs.
Developers: Keep this tab open while building layouts. It's the fastest way to get raw text for testing your CSS 'overflow' and 'flexbox' behaviors.
Marketing Tip: If a client is too focused on the text instead of the design, using Lorem Ipsum is the best way to steer the conversation back to the visual branding.
